    Index

    A B C E F G L M P R S T U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addPublication(Publication) - Method in class Catalogue
    Adds a publication to the catalogue.

    B

    Book - Class in Unnamed Package
    Represents a book entry in the catalogue.
    Book(String, int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class Book
    Constructs a new Book with the specified bibliographic data.
    BookGUI - Class in Unnamed Package
    Main application window for the Book Catalogue desktop application.
    BookGUI() - Constructor for class BookGUI
    Constructs and initialises the main application window.
    BookNotFoundException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
    Checked exception thrown when a publication with the requested title cannot be found in the Catalogue.
    BookNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class BookNotFoundException
    Constructs a new BookNotFoundException for the given title.

    C

    Catalogue - Class in Unnamed Package
    Core in-memory catalogue that stores and manages a collection of Publication objects.
    Catalogue() - Constructor for class Catalogue
    Constructs a new empty Catalogue.
    countByGenre() - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns a map from genre name to the count of books in that genre.
    countUniqueAuthors() - Method in class Catalogue
    Counts the number of distinct author names among all Book entries.

    E

    Example - Section in exception class BookNotFoundException
     
    exportToCSV(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Exports all Book entries to a CSV file with a header row.

    F

    filterByGenre(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns all Book entries that belong to the specified genre (case-insensitive exact match).
    findPublicationByTitle(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Finds and returns the first publication whose title exactly matches the given string (case-insensitive comparison).

    G

    getAllPublications() - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns a defensive copy of all publications currently in the catalogue.
    getAuthor() - Method in class Book
    Returns the author of this book.
    getDistinctGenres() - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns a sorted list of all distinct genre values present in the catalogue.
    getGenre() - Method in class Book
    Returns the genre of this book.
    getPublisher() - Method in class Book
    Returns the publisher of this book.
    getTitle() - Method in class Publication
    Returns the title of this publication.
    getYear() - Method in class Publication
    Returns the publication year.

    L

    loadFromFile(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Deserialises the publication list from a previously saved binary file.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class BookGUI
    Application entry point.

    P

    Publication - Class in Unnamed Package
    Abstract base class representing a general publication in the catalogue.
    Publication(String, int) - Constructor for class Publication
    Constructs a new Publication with the given title and year.

    R

    removePublicationByTitle(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Removes the publication whose title exactly matches (case-insensitive) the given string.

    S

    saveToFile(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Serialises the current publication list to a binary file using Java object serialisation.
    searchByAuthor(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns all Book entries whose author field contains the given query string (case-insensitive substring match).
    searchByTitle(String) - Method in class Catalogue
    Returns all publications whose title contains the given query string (case-insensitive substring match).
    setAuthor(String) - Method in class Book
    Sets the author of this book.
    setGenre(String) - Method in class Book
    Sets the genre of this book.
    setPublisher(String) - Method in class Book
    Sets the publisher of this book.
    setTitle(String) - Method in class Publication
    Sets a new title for this publication.
    setYear(int) - Method in class Publication
    Sets the publication year.

    T

    toString() - Method in class Book
    Returns a detailed string representation of this book.
    toString() - Method in class Publication
    Returns a human-readable string representation of this publication.
    Typical workflow - Section in class Catalogue
     

    U

    Usage example - Section in class Book
